title: How to Create a Table for "Actions" in the "Opportunities" Board?
excerpt: Under the “Opportunities” board, we create an “Activity” called “Actions” with deadlines based on the needs of each opportunity. I want a table that shows all the Actions from all Opportunities, sorted by their deadlines…

posts.author: nsyll (Nektarios)
posts.cookedHtml:
Under the “Opportunities” board, we create an “Activity” called “Actions” with deadlines based on the needs of each opportunity. I want a table that shows all the Actions from all Opportunities, sorted by their deadlines.

Is there a way to create such a table or something similar to address this need?
